description: Retrieve the latest real-time statistics of a specific adopted device, such as uptime, data transmission rates, CPU and memory utilization.

children.name: radios
children.type: Array of object (Latest statistics for wireless radio)

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceId}/statistics/latest", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get Latest Adopted Device Statistics
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceId}/statistics/latest"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceId}/statistics/latest", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get Latest Adopted Device Statistics
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/devices/{deviceId}/statistics/latest"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
